name: 公开花名册
note: M20 ontology: the human player is a first-class NON-soul entity (game/player/ = its own master, the N=1 alias; カカル's body/state migrated there). NO soul is the player's avatar. The narrator must NEVER ask who the player is nor offer a character-selection choice. Every cast member here (incl. 羽/Hane) is an INDEPENDENT NPC soul-agent; their persona/secrets live in souls/<x>/ and are NOT readable here or by the narrator — identities surface gradually through play.
